summary: Tested new School Holiday Calendar feature. All backend endpoints working: /api/school-holiday-countries (36 countries), /api/subdivisions/DE (16 German states), /api/school-holidays/DE/2026 (121+ holidays), /api/school-holidays/FR/2026 (42 holidays), subdivision filtering (DE-BY returns 8 holidays). All frontend features working: 4 tabs visible (Home, School, Saved, Settings), School tab empty state with 'Plan around school breaks', country picker with supported countries (school icon) and unsupported grayed out with N/A, Germany loads 121 breaks grouped by month, subdivision selector appears and filters correctly, year picker works (2025-2030), Home tab regression verified.
critical_code_review_comments: School tab correctly uses data-testid attributes: school-header-title, school-country-selector, school-year-dropdown, school-subdivision-selector, school-stats, school-holiday-card-{m}-{idx}
Country picker correctly separates supported (36) vs unsupported countries with school icon badge vs N/A text and grayed styling
School holidays are sorted by startDate and grouped by month correctly
OpenHolidays API integration caches results properly (7-day cache for countries, 30-day for subdivisions)
Subdivision filtering works via query param ?subdivision=DE-BY
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 tested new School Holiday Calendar feature. Backend endpoints all work: GET /api/school-holiday-countries returns 36 countries, GET /api/subdivisions/DE returns 16 German states, GET /api/school-holidays/{country}/{year} returns holidays with optional subdivision filter. Frontend School tab works: empty state shows 'Plan around school breaks', country picker shows 36 supported countries with school icon and unsupported grayed with N/A, selecting Germany loads 121 breaks grouped by month with stats badges, subdivision selector filters by region, year picker changes year. All 4 tabs visible and working. No mocked APIs - uses real OpenHolidaysAPI.org.
